rows.label: qev015701_MSG0001
rows.name: E-Excuse me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm truly sorry to bother you when
you're in a hurry, but could you
listen to a sudden request of mine?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0003
rows.name:
I won't take up your time. Or rather,
I don't even have the luxury to be
taking up your time... um...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0004
rows.name:
Um, so, I mean! I know that normally,
a request like this should go
through the proper channels![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0005
rows.name:
But it's an emergency, and I can't just sit
still, like a drowning man grasping at straws...
Ahh, I'm sorry! Calling you a straw...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0006
rows.name:
Um, um, anyway, what I mean
is, if you could just listen
to my request first, um...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_JNK0010
rows.name: Listen

rows.label: qev015701_SEL0011
rows.name: Listen to her request.

rows.label: qev015701_JNK0020
rows.name: Soothe

rows.label: qev015701_SEL0021
rows.name: Calm her down.

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0007
rows.name:
Really!? You'll...
listen to my request!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0008
rows.name:
Ahh, thank goodness... The first person
I talked to was so understanding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'm somewhat on the shy side, so I was incredibly
anxious, thinking it would be agonizing to have
to call out to strangers over and over![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0010
rows.name:
Eh? Ah, did you not understand
a single thing I just said...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0011
rows.name: R-Right... I need to calm down a little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0013
rows.name:
Thank you. I've calmed
down quite a bit...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0014
rows.name: Let's see, what was I talking about...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0015
rows.name: Ah, that's right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0016
rows.name:
What I wanted to request is for
you to deliver supplies to a BLADE
team that's out on a mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0017
rows.name:
Believe it or not, I'm a mechanic
specializing in Dolls, and I do handle
quite a few assignments, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0018
rows.name:
Just a moment ago, I received a sudden
call from a team I'm close with...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0019
rows.name:
They asked me to deliver a set of
supplies so they can repair their Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0020
rows.name:
Apparently, right after they headed out for their job,
they were attacked by a native creature called a Whim
Guila and are stranded in the middle of the wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0021
rows.name:
I make it my creed to provide thorough
aftercare, but outside the city is
definitely beyond my jurisdiction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0022
rows.name:
Besides, when I asked, they told me the reason
their Dolls broke was none other than an attack
by a Whim Guila! Isn't that terrible!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0023
rows.name:
This is absolutely not a matter a mere
mechanic can follow up on... More than
anything, time is of the essence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0024
rows.name:
But when I think of the damaged Dolls,
I just feel so, so sorry for them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0025
rows.name:
In the end, it was fine up until I
stepped outside the city, but I myself
panicked, not knowing what to do first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0026
rows.name:
Just as I was reconsidering that I
really had no choice but to borrow
someone's help, you happened to pass by![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0027
rows.name:
I thought that normally, I should
look for someone to accept this
on the Quest Board, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0028
rows.name:
Like I said earlier, time is of the essence! If I
posted the job through the proper channels, administrative
procedures and all that would just take time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0029
rows.name:
This was the only way! I believe you
can bill the leader of the team you'll
be helping for the reward, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0030
rows.name:
Delivering the supplies to the stranded
team... Please, I'm begging you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0031
rows.name:
Ahh... Even now, those damaged Dolls
must be left exposed to the wind and
rain in the middle of the wilderness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0032
rows.name:
Please deliver the repair supplies
to them as quickly as possible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0033
rows.name:
I'm so worried that I don't think
I'll be able to sleep tonight...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0034
rows.name:
Have you delivered the repair
supplies to Metz-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0035
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Eh!? They don't seem to be returning
until they defeat that Whim Guila...!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0036
rows.name:
I feel so sorry for the Dolls, exposed
to the wind and rain with only Metz-san's
sloppy maintenance to rely on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015701_MSG0037
rows.name:
Please defeat the Whim Guila as quickly
as possible and save those Dolls![ST:wait ]
